generation.code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    has_dup = len(set(a)) < n
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct - find permutation parity
    # Map value to its target position in sorted array
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0  # 0 = even, 1 = odd
    
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = pos[a[j]]
                cycle_len += 1
            # A cycle of length L contributes L-1 transpositions
            parity ^= (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    if parity == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
